title.rendered: Starts April 29! Earn a 2026 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising 💻

content.rendered: The 2026 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising program covers the fundamentals of social media marketing and fundraising for your nonprofit. Participants will learn how to create a social media strategy, craft a content marketing plan, and current best practices for using social media for community engagement and fundraising. The total cost is $229 USD and the program starts April 29!
